title: Armor strength color-varying!
body:
Durability-Based Armor Colors 🎨✨
🔹 Tired of guessing your armor's durability? Now you don’t have to! This resource pack dynamically changes the color of Diamond and Netherite armor based on its remaining durability, giving you a quick visual cue before your gear breaks.
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8264549502f0886492dc40c489333236e63d8ab_0.webp)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d1aece0dba21eb89cd7c87b7b699092bd8628d9_0.webp)

💠 How It Works:
Your armor will shift through six distinct colors depending on its condition:

🟦 2% - 20% durability: Blue – Almost new, still strong!

🟩 20% - 40% durability: Green – Lightly damaged, but still fine.

🟨 40% - 60% durability: Yellow – You should start paying attention...

🟧 60% - 80% durability: Orange – Time to think about repairs!

🟥 80% - 97% durability: Red – Danger! Your armor is in bad shape!

⚫ 97% - 100% durability: Almost black – It's about to shatter!

🔧 Compatibility:
✔ Works with CIT Resewn (Fabric) or OptiFine (Forge).
✔ Supports Minecraft 1.20.1.
✔ Currently available for Diamond & Netherite armor (more to come!).

⚠ Make sure to install CIT Resewn for Fabric users!

👀 Never let your armor break unexpectedly again! Try it now and enhance your survival experience! 🚀  
[![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d826aa035bd8a0893120a5b80da1d7731845739f.png)](https://t.me/kizzevol4k_minecraft)
